allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[x for x in v if not 'canary' in x and not 'preview' in x and not 'alpha' in x and \(x.startswith\('4.'\) or x.startswith\('5.'\)\)]; print\(stable[-15:]\)")
